g.text: Recovered Kahlus v1 versus standard EEG baselines

text.style: font-size: 7.2px; font-family: 'DejaVu Sans'; text-anchor: start; fill: #6b7280

g.text: Bars are median MSE after de-duplicating repeated baseline-ranking artifacts. Lower is better.
